rule: each dimension 8 or higher, no averaging, scored only after Tier 1 fully passes; scored by qc-specialist-podcast, a different persona from the writer

1_authorial_voice_fidelity.why: A single intimate, confessional first-person voice held from the cold-open to the final image.

2_arc_execution.why: Clean descent, a small true turn on the student stool, an honest non-rescue, and an invitation; every beat earns its budget.

3_persuasion_mechanics.why: The claim is earned through lived detail rather than argument, which is the correct Vulnerable mechanic.

4_opening_power.why: Opens on a confession the host has never said out loud, an immediate stake.

5_closing_power.why: The tide-and-thread image resolves the emptiness and hands the listener one brave action.

6_captivation_throughout.why: Tight length with sustained emotional tension and no padding to hit a word floor.

7_fidelity_to_the_respondent.why: Uses only the respondent's own supplied stories: the wholesale order, the closed account, the father, and Ruth.

8_research_integration_quality.why: Source-light by design for rich personal material; expanded answers and power statements integrated honestly with zero fabricated sources.

9_delivery_craft.why: Fully speakable at pace; natural cadence; nothing a mouth would stumble on.

10_audio_direction_quality.why: Emotion tags track the emotional arc and concentrate at pivots without crowding.
